title: A2A Agent Card
description: Validates Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol agent cards that advertise an agent's identity, endpoint, and skills to other agents in the system.

name.description: Display name of the agent as advertised to other agents in the A2A network.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this agent does, used by orchestrators for routing decisions.

url.description: Endpoint URL where this agent can be reached (HTTP, WebSocket, or local bridge address).

version.description: Version of this agent card, following semantic versioning.

capabilities.description: Structured declaration of what this agent can do, used for capability-based routing.

streaming.description: Whether this agent supports streaming responses.

pushNotifications.description: Whether this agent can send push notifications for async task completion.

stateTransitionHistory.description: Whether this agent exposes a history of task state transitions.

multimodal.description: Whether this agent can process multiple input modalities (text, image, audio).

skills.description: List of discrete skills this agent can perform, enabling fine-grained task routing.

items.description: A single skill offered by this agent.

id.description: Unique identifier for this skill within the agent.

tags.description: Tags for categorizing and discovering this skill.

examples.description: Example prompts or task descriptions that this skill can handle, used for intent matching.

items.description: An example input that would trigger this skill.
